name: ldn

metadata.name: ldn
metadata.summary: Python package for local wireless communication with a Nintendo Switch.

documentation: This package implements LDN, or local wireless communication with a Nintendo Switch. Because LDN operates at the data link layer it requires low-level access to your network hardware. This package only supports Linux systems.

modules.name: ldn.wlan
documentation: This file implements WLAN functions using NL80211

methods.name: ldn.wlan.Monitor.__init__
documentation: This class represents an interface in monitor mode

methods.name: ldn.wlan.STAInterface.__init__
documentation: This class represents an interface in station mode

methods.name: ldn.wlan.APInterface.__init__
documentation: This class represents an interface in access point mode

methods.name: ldn.wlan.WLAN.__init__
documentation: This class acts as a factory for WLAN interfaces
